title: New Scholarship Program for Tribal Students
content: The government has announced a new scholarship program specifically for tribal students pursuing higher education. The program offers financial assistance up to ₹50,000 per year.

title: Forest Rights Act Implementation Update
content: District administration has started accepting new applications under the Forest Rights Act. Tribal communities can now claim their traditional forest land rights.

title: Free Health Checkup Camp in Tribal Areas
content: A free health checkup camp will be organized in tribal villages next week. Services include general health screening, eye checkup, and medicine distribution.

title: Agricultural Training Program Announced
content: A 5-day training program on modern farming techniques will be conducted for tribal farmers. Topics include organic farming, water conservation, and crop diversification.

title: Van Dhan Vikas Kendras Expansion
content: New Van Dhan Vikas Kendras are being established to help tribal communities process and market forest produce. This will create employment and increase income.
